name: MRBF Battery Terminal Fuse 40A

specs._raw_title: 30A-300A Battery Terminal Mount MRBF Waterproof Fuse Block Kit 58V Stud 5/16" Marine Rated Battery Fuse for Boat Truck
specs._raw_color_options: Only Terminal Fuses / One way and Fuse / Dual channel an Fuse

description: Marine Rated Battery Fuse (MRBF) — bolt-down terminal fuse that mounts directly to a battery post or MRBF holder. 58V DC max, IP66 waterproof, ignition-protected for engine-bay use. 5/16" (M8) stud hardware. Listing offers 30A through 300A; this entry models the 40A variant.
packageContents: 1× MRBF terminal fuse (40A variant). Listing also offers 'One way + Fuse' and 'Dual channel + Fuse' kit options that include the matching MRBF holder.
